name: QA 1131
description:

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1131.out.bad)
2272c2272
< # HELP hinv_ncpu number of CPUs in the system
---
> # HELP hinv_ncpu b'number of CPUs in the system'
2274c2274
< hinv_ncpu{domainname="DOMAINID",groupid="GROUPID",hostname="HOST",machineid="MACHINEID",userid="USERID",agent="linux"} 16
---
> hinv_ncpu{domainname="DOMAINID",GROUPID"997",hostname="HOST",machineid="MACHINEID",USERID"996",agent="linux"} 4
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
